allow: Bash(gh pr view * --repo Blitzapps/blitz-orm --json reviews,comments --jq '.reviews[] | {author: .author.login, state: .state, body: .body}')
Bash(gh api repos/Blitzapps/blitz-orm/pulls/*/comments --jq '.[] | {author: .user.login, body: .body, path: .path, line: .line, diff_hunk: .diff_hunk}')
Bash(gh pr view * --repo Blitzapps/blitz-orm --json comments --jq '.comments[] | {author: .author.login, body: .body}')
